'''Drac Gerrat''' was a fisherman. In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], he owned and operated a fishing vessel, the ''[[Icon]]'', on [[Dorumaa]].

==Biography==
When not at work, he could usually be found in one of Dorumaa's [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]]. He dreamed of killing a [[Nus Whale]], and marketing polished bits of whale bone as good luck charms. In actuality, he avoided the creatures, since they could easily destroy the ''Icon''.

{{Char-stub}}
